## Why it qualifies

_Check all that apply:_
- [ ] Named publisher with disclosed methodology
- [ ] Contains quantitative data (not just qualitative)
- [ ] Sample size is disclosed
- [ ] Published within the last 3 years
- [ ] Relevant to recruiting / talent acquisition
